data.body: I do not know. There were a few Black NFL players in 1920s, most famously Fritz Pollard as player & coach 1920-1926. They re-integrated post-WW2 due in part to expansion to LA. data.body: Class 2 had a fantastic time investigating which materials sink or float. We made 7 different boats using a variety of materials and tested them out!
